allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix TypeScript build errors blocking Vercel deployment

- app/api/haldus/invoice/[orderId]/route.ts: wrap Uint8Array in Buffer.from\(\)
  so it's assignable to NextResponse body \(BodyInit\)
- lib/send-email.ts: replace .throwOnError\(\).catch\(\) chain \(catch not available
  on PostgrestFilterBuilder\) with try/catch block

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git add lib/resend.ts lib/send-email.ts lib/supabase-admin.ts lib/supabase.ts && git status)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix module-level initialization crashing Next.js build

Supabase and Resend clients were initialized at module load time.
Next.js evaluates modules during the build's static analysis phase,
before env vars are injected, causing the build to crash with
"Missing API key" and "supabaseUrl is required".

Fix: lazy initialization via Proxy \(supabase, supabaseAdmin\) and
a getter function \(getResend\) so clients are created on first use
inside request handlers, not at import time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git commit --allow-empty -m "Trigger Vercel redeploy from main branch" && git push origin main)
Bash(git add app/page.tsx app/tooted/page.tsx components/Header.tsx && git status)
Bash(gh api repos/RonaldOutline/grundfospumpepood/deployments --jq '.[0] | {id, environment, created_at, sha: .sha[0:7]}' 2>/dev/null || echo "deployments not available")
Bash(git commit --allow-empty -m "Trigger redeploy: fix category links" && git push origin main)
Bash(git add app/page.tsx app/toode/[slug]/page.tsx components/Footer.tsx && git status)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix category links, wording, and duplicate header on product page

- Footer: fix 'Sooja tarbevesi' → 'Soe tarbevesi', truncated slug 'drenaa' → 'drenaaz'
- page.tsx: fix featured products display text 'Sooja tarbevesi' → 'Soe tarbevesi'
- toode/[slug]/page.tsx: remove local Header component that caused a duplicate
  header and used display names as tegevusala slugs \(broken category links\);
  rely on global Header from layout instead

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(ls node_modules/next-intl/dist/ 2>/dev/null | head -20
node -e "try { require\('next-intl/middleware'\); console.log\('middleware ok'\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\('middleware error:', e.message\) }"
node -e "try { require\('next-intl/proxy'\); console.log\('proxy ok'\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\('proxy error:', e.message\) }")
Bash(git mv proxy.ts middleware.ts && echo "renamed back")
Bash(git mv middleware.ts proxy.ts && git rm i18n/request.ts)
Bash(git add next.config.ts "app/[locale]/layout.tsx" proxy.ts && git status)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix Vercel build: remove createNextIntlPlugin, use static message imports

- Remove createNextIntlPlugin from next.config.ts \(plugin was causing
  Vercel "internal error" build failures\)
- Replace getMessages\(\) in locale layout with direct static JSON imports
  — pass locale + messages props directly to NextIntlClientProvider
- Rename middleware.ts → proxy.ts per Next.js 16 deprecation
- Delete i18n/request.ts \(no longer needed without the plugin\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add app/[locale]/checkout/page.tsx app/[locale]/tooted/page.tsx app/[locale]/kategooria/[slug]/page.tsx messages/et.json messages/en.json messages/ru.json messages/lv.json messages/lt.json messages/pl.json && git status)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Translate checkout page and add JP Water Automatics category

- Fully translated checkout/page.tsx using next-intl \(30+ strings\)
- Translated country names \(EE/LV/LT/FI\), form labels, validation errors,
  parcel machine selector, order summary, payment section
- Added jp-veeautomaat → jpWaterAutomatics to SLUG_TO_CAT_KEY in
  tooted/page.tsx and kategooria/[slug]/page.tsx
- Added all new checkout form keys + jpWaterAutomatics to all 6 message
  files \(et, en, ru, lv, lt, pl\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add admin email confirmation for unconfirmed clients

- GET /api/haldus/clients/[id] now returns emailConfirmedAt from auth.users
- PATCH /api/haldus/clients/[id] handles action:'confirm_email' via supabaseAdmin.auth.admin.updateUserById
- Client detail page shows email confirmation status \(Kinnitatud / Kinnitamata\)
- Superadmin sees "Kinnita email käsitsi" button when email is unconfirmed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Improve search intelligence: aiapump → JP Veeautomaat, products page AI fallback

- Add JP Veeautomaat / aiapump / aiapumbad / kastmispump to AI category list
- Enrich all category labels with Estonian synonyms so Claude maps correctly
- API now returns categoryType \('tegevusala' | 'seeria'\) alongside categorySlug
- Front page: use ?seeria= for series categories \(was always ?tegevusala=\)
- Products page: AI fallback when text search yields 0 results — shows
  'Kas mõtlesid kategooriat X?' suggestion button that applies the category filter

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('messages/et.json'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
# Show checkout section keys
checkout = data.get\('checkout', {}\)
print\('checkout keys:', list\(checkout.keys\(\)\)\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
files = ['et', 'en', 'ru', 'lv', 'lt', 'pl']
for lang in files:
    with open\(f'messages/{lang}.json'\) as f:
        data = json.load\(f\)
    checkout = data.get\('checkout', {}\)
    print\(f'{lang}: last 3 keys = {list\(checkout.keys\(\)\)[-3:]}'\)
")

        'couponApply': 'Zastosuj',
        'couponRemove': 'Usuń kupon',
        'couponNotFound': 'Kod kuponu nie został znaleziony',

        'couponNotYetValid': 'Ten kupon nie jest jeszcze ważny',
        'couponExpired': 'Ten kupon wygasł',

        'couponMinOrder': 'Minimalna kwota zamówienia to {amount} €',
    },
}

for lang, keys in translations.items\(\):
    path = f'messages/{lang}.json'
    with open\(path, encoding='utf-8'\) as f:

    data['checkout'].update\(keys\)
